name: TrustLab
description: TrustLab — trust & safety intelligence and measurement API for platform integrity.

seo.title: TrustLab — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: TrustLab: TrustLab — trust & safety intelligence and measurement API for platform integrity.

when_to_use: Evaluating AI model trustworthiness across safety dimensions
Running red-team assessments on deployed LLM applications
Building AI governance workflows with trust scoring and reporting
Auditing AI systems for bias, fairness, and safety metrics

pros: Useful for board-level and regulator reporting
cons: Enterprise consulting blend, not pure software
Opaque pricing and long sales cycle
Value clearest to large, regulated platforms
review.verdict: Measurement and assurance layer for mature T&S programs, not a classifier you call from your backend.
review.best_for: Large platforms proving platform integrity to regulators, advertisers, or boards.
review.not_for: Product teams needing a low-latency classification API.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
